title: hiraea smilacina
intro: Hiraea smilacina, also known as the New Zealand Smilax, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hiraea smilacina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Hiraea smilacina can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and has been traditionally used by the indigenous people of New Zealand for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
